title: Calendar Booking
hints: Notice that a new booking is valid only if it avoids all previously accepted intervals. What property must hold between the new range and every kept range?
Consider maintaining the accepted intervals in sorted order by start time. How does sorting help you quickly check for overlaps with a new candidate?
A new interval overlaps an existing one if their ranges intersect. With sorted intervals, you only need to check neighbors around where the new start would fit.
